children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The regulations issued under section 4581 or 4582 of this title shall provide for the imposition of civil penalties described in subsection (b).

children.heading: Unlawful acts
children.label: 1 Unlawful acts
children.text: It shall be unlawful for a person to violate, attempt to violate, conspire to violate, or cause a violation of any order, regulation, notification requirement, or prohibition issued under this subchapter.

children.heading: Civil penalty
children.label: 2 Civil penalty
children.text: The Secretary may impose civil penalties on any person who commits an unlawful act described in paragraph (1) in amounts equivalent to amounts provided for under section 206(b) of the International Emergency Economic Powers Act () for violations under that Act.50 U.S.C. 1705(b)

children.heading: Divestment
children.label: 3 Divestment
children.text: The Secretary may compel the divestment of a covered national security transaction in a prohibited technology determined to be in violation of or regulations issued thereunder.section 4581(a) of this title

children.heading: Relief
children.label: 4 Relief
children.text: The President may direct the Attorney General of the United States to seek appropriate relief, including divestment relief for violations of the prohibition set forth in subsection 4581(a) of this title, in the district courts of the United States, in order to implement and enforce this subchapter.1So in original. Probably should be “section”.1
